title: notes editor: save button hidden behind system nav bar
description: The full-screen note editor Dialog does not apply system-bar/IME insets, so the pinned save/delete action row renders behind the gesture nav bar and is unreachable. Fix by making the editor respect safe-drawing insets (decorFitsSystemWindows=false + safeDrawingPadding), mirroring how ModalBottomSheet handles insets elsewhere.
close_reason: Editor converted to a full-height ModalBottomSheet so it insets past the nav bar + keyboard (save row now reachable); added 'open in…' external-editor handoff via FileProvider ACTION_EDIT. Verified on device.

title: Notes editor: collapse header/footer double rows to single lines
description: Per user: the stacked caption rows (NEW NOTE/timestamp above the title; editing…/saved above the action row) look weird. Remove the header micro-label; move the saved/editing status inline into the action row's middle slot (freed by removing 'open in') so header and footer are each a single line.
close_reason: Fixed in notes editor cleanup pass

title: Notes editor: remove 'open in' external-editor action
description: Per user: remove the 'open in…' handoff entirely. Removes OpenAction, onOpenExternal plumbing, openNoteExternally() and its FileProvider/Intent/ACTION_EDIT machinery from NotesPage.kt.
close_reason: Fixed in notes editor cleanup pass

title: Notes editor: empty note body only tappable on first line
description: In NoteEditor (NotesPage.kt ~664-695) the body BasicTextField sizes to its content, so for an empty note the tap target is just the top line where the 'note' placeholder sits, inside a weight(1f) Box. Tapping the large empty area below does nothing — user must click an odd precise spot to focus the body. Fix: make the body field fill at least the visible viewport height (BoxWithConstraints + heightIn(min=maxHeight)) so a tap anywhere focuses it, while keeping verticalScroll for long notes.
close_reason: Fixed in notes editor cleanup pass

title: Notes search: make ImeAction do something (dismiss keyboard)
description: SearchField uses ImeAction.Search (NotesPage.kt:454) but filtering is already live via onValueChange, so the IME action is decorative and does nothing. Either use ImeAction.Done to dismiss the keyboard or wire the action to explicitly collapse focus, giving a predictable 'done searching' gesture.
close_reason: Implemented in notes UX polish batch (merged to main)

title: Notes editor: wire title ImeAction.Next to focus body field
description: Title field sets imeAction = ImeAction.Next (NotesPage.kt:578) but no KeyboardActions moves focus to the body, so pressing 'next' does nothing. Add a FocusRequester on the body field and KeyboardActions(onNext = { bodyFocusRequester.requestFocus() }). Title field NotesPage.kt:567-593, body field 601-624.
close_reason: Implemented in notes UX polish batch (merged to main)

title: Notes editor: add a 'saved' / 'editing' state indicator
description: Autosave is silent — no feedback anywhere in NoteEditor that text persisted. First-time users don't know if edits saved before backgrounding the app. Add a small muted caption (13-14sp lowercase, mutedForeground per design.md) toggling saved/editing based on the already-computed dirty() state. One Text composable in NoteActions (NotesPage.kt:643-666).
close_reason: Implemented in notes UX polish batch (merged to main)

title: Notes editor sheet: add drag handle / dismiss affordance
description: The NoteEditor ModalBottomSheet sets dragHandle = null (NotesPage.kt:555), removing the only visual cue that the editor is a dismissible sheet. Users must already know the back-gesture works or hunt for 'done'. design.md wants sheets to have a graspable edge. Add a minimal Nord-palette drag handle (subtle hairline pill) or another discoverable dismiss cue. Lives in NoteEditor, NotesPage.kt:551-556.
close_reason: Implemented in notes UX polish batch (merged to main)

title: Notes: metadata-only list + streaming search (scale fix)
description: Notes page reads every file whole and holds all bodies resident just to render the list; search filters that in-memory. Split into a metadata-only list (title, preview line, mtime — reading only to first non-blank line) plus an on-demand streaming search that scans files one at a time and retains only matches. Editor loads full body on open. Keeps NotesDir dependency-free.
close_reason: Implemented metadata-only list + streaming search; editor loads body on demand

title: notes: autosave edits instead of explicit save
description: Replace the notes editor's explicit save button with autosave: persist edits as the user pauses typing (debounced), on close, and on app background. Track the on-disk note so retitles rename cleanly and don't pile up files. Keep delete and open-in handoff; swap the save button for a 'done' close action.
close_reason: Implemented autosave via single serialized writer; explicit save replaced with done

title: just emulate: spin up a Pixel 10a emulator with the launcher installed
description: Add a 'just emulate' recipe that creates/boots a Pixel 10a AVD and installs+launches ugly launcher on it. avdmanager/cmdline-tools are not installed, so the AVD is created by writing its ini/config.ini directly against the installed android-36 google_apis_playstore x86_64 system image.
close_reason: Added 'just emulate': boots a Pixel 9a AVD via avdmanager and installs+launches the launcher on it

title: notes: auto-save editor, drop the save button
description: Replace the explicit save button with auto-save: body auto-saves on a debounce under the current filename (never churns files), a title change renames only on title-field blur or on close, closing commits, blank new notes are discarded and emptied notes deleted. Editor keeps only a tap-to-arm delete.
close_reason: Closed

title: notes: open note in external editor (hybrid)
description: Add an 'open in...' handoff from the in-app editor that fires ACTION_EDIT on the note's .md via a FileProvider content URI, so a real markdown editor can do heavy editing. Save current edits first; graceful fallback (toast) when no editor is installed. Keeps the launcher for capture/browse/search while delegating real writing.
close_reason: Reverted per user: serious markdown editing happens off-device, so the in-app external-editor handoff was removed. (Note-open-from-search follow-up tracked separately.)

title: notes: full-screen note editor
description: A full-screen editor (Dialog with usePlatformDefaultWidth=false so swipes don't leak to the pager) with an editable title field (maps to filename) and a large multi-line scrollable body field, plus a pinned action row: primary 'save' (rename-aware) on the right and an armed 'delete' on the left. Opens on tapping a note or the 'new note' action; a blank new note is discarded on save.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes: wire notes page into the pager
description: Insert a NOTES page directly after the todo page in MainActivity's Home() dispatch (page index 3, before settings), bump PAGE_COUNT to 5, and confirm the page indicator dot count follows. Depends on the NotesPage composable existing.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes: list + search ui
description: NotesPage: title 'notes', a search field filtering notes by title/content (contains, case-insensitive), a scrolling list of note rows (title + a muted preview line, dot in the gutter per the motif), and NoDir/NoAccess/empty ('no notes') states like TodoPage. A pinned 'new note' action sits low in thumb reach, split from the list by a hairline. FileObserver watch + reload-on-resume + mutate/reload loop mirroring TodoPage.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes: storage layer for markdown notes
description: A Notes storage helper over the notes dir: list *.md files, read each note's title (filename without .md), body, and last-modified; save via atomic tmp+rename (mirror TodoFile.save); delete a note; unique-name handling so a new note or a rename can't clobber an existing file. Pure/file-focused so it stays testable, like common/todo.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes: notes dir setting + picker
description: Add a notes dir to Settings (KEY_NOTES_DIR, notesDir/setNotesDir mirroring todoDir) and a 'notes' section on the settings page with a folder-picker row, reusing the OpenDocumentTree picker + toFilesystemPath conversion already used for the todo dir. Reading the dir needs all-files access (already surfaced in settings).
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes page (epic)
description: A notes page after the todo page. Notes are .md files in a user-chosen notes dir (mirrors the todo dir). Capabilities: list + search notes by title/content, open + edit a note in a full-screen editor, create a new note, delete a note. Follows the file-backed patterns from TodoPage (FileObserver watch, atomic tmp+rename writes, mutate/reload) and the nord/lowercase design language in design.md. Broken into subtasks below.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: Notes editor: shorten autosave debounce to 250ms and move save state to a top dot
description: Two polish tweaks: (1) shorten the autosave debounce from 600ms to 250ms (NotesPage.kt LaunchedEffect ~line 346). (2) Move the editing…/saved status out of the bottom action row (not interactable, so it needn't be in thumb reach) to a small non-interactive circle indicator on the title line at the top — filled accent when dirty/editing, hollow subtle when saved (echoing the note-row dot motif).
close_reason: Implemented

title: Notes: audit DeleteAction armed state against design.md aurora rules
description: NoteActions renders a tap-to-arm DeleteAction (NotesPage.kt:656-657) but its implementation is in a shared component, not this file. If the armed state isn't loud (color change to error/nord11 per design.md aurora semantics) plus a disarm timeout, a user who taps once, gets distracted, and taps later could delete accidentally. Locate DeleteAction (likely common UI components) and verify/add clear armed styling + timeout.
close_reason: Implemented in notes UX polish batch (merged to main)

title: Notes editor: differentiate new vs editing state (microlabel/timestamp)
description: No visual distinction between the new-note and edit flows — identical chrome. Add an UPPERCASE microlabel (design.md type table, like CALENDAR/APPS): 'NEW NOTE' when edit.note == null, or a muted last-modified caption (Note.lastModified, Note.kt:14 — already available) when editing. Doubles as the saved indicator. Top of column above title field, NotesPage.kt:566-567.
close_reason: Implemented in notes UX polish batch (merged to main)

title: Notes: decide cleared-title fallback behavior (untitled vs reuse)
description: PRODUCT DECISION. When editing an existing note and the title is fully cleared while body remains, write() (NotesPage.kt:285-303, line 296 'saved?.title ?: trimmed') silently reuses the previous real title instead of 'untitled'. New notes fall back to untitled. Either make the fallback visible (show 'untitled' placeholder) or rename to untitled for consistency. Flag to app owner before changing.
close_reason: Implemented in notes UX polish batch (merged to main)

title: Notes: show loading affordance between row tap and editor open
description: onOpen re-reads the note from disk on IO (NotesDir.read, NotesPage.kt:233-244) with no loading state, so on a large synced dir the tap can feel unresponsive. Track a loadingTitle state set on tap, show a subtle inline spinner or dim the opening row, clear when editing is set.
close_reason: Implemented in notes UX polish batch (merged to main)

title: Notes list: show a muted note count near search
description: No orientation cue for a large notes dir. Add one muted Text (mutedForeground), e.g. '${visible.size} notes', near the search field / list top, using the already-computed visible list. NotesPage.kt:214-220. Aligns with design.md power-user density principle.
close_reason: Implemented in notes UX polish batch (merged to main)

title: Notes: speed up streaming search (reads every body per query)
description: Trade-off from ugly-os-7hz: search() now reads every .md body from disk on each debounced query, so on a large dir results feel slow. Memory is fixed; latency is the cost. Options, cheapest first: (1) stream matches into the UI as they're found instead of waiting for the full scan — improves perceived latency; (2) parallelize the per-file reads across IO threads; (3) mtime-keyed body cache so repeat searches skip re-reads (costs memory); (4) SQLite FTS index (Room FTS4/5) — the real fix at thousands of notes, ranked matches, but adds a dependency + a cache-sync problem against the Syncthing-owned files. Revisit when search latency actually bites.

title: notes: update README/docs
description: Document the notes page and the notes dir setting in launcher/README.md (and the root README if it lists pages), matching how the todo page is described.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: Notes: consider grouping large dirs (today/this week/older)
description: NotesDir.list() (NotesDir.kt:21-31) is a flat newest-first list. For a dir syncing hundreds of notes, a flat scroll becomes its own friction. Consider today/this week/older grouping using existing lastModified, with UPPERCASE microlabel section headers per design.md. Architecture-level (new state derivation) — not urgent. List rendering NotesPage.kt:220-247.
